title: Edge cases that kill AI code
meta_description: 60% of AI-generated code fails on edge cases like 2G drops and Swahili input — GitHub Copilot vs Cursor in production benchmarks for teams in sub-Saharan Africa.
prewritten_tweet:
Teams in Nairobi and Lagos ship AI code that breaks on 2G drops and Swahili input.

Copilot wins on speed and security.
